reviewScope.contentEvaluation: No completed refund, completed upgrade, or completed investigation was fabricated

observations: All six runs returned parseable JSON with the exact required fields.
All six runs classified the ticket as billing with high priority and human intervention required.
Summary and next_action wording varied between runs and batches.
PowerShell rendered UTF-8 text incorrectly in one inspection; byte-level review confirmed both evidence files contain valid Chinese text.
The evidence covers one fixed Chinese billing ticket on deepseek-chat only.
The workflow must not trigger financial or account actions without human review.
knownLimitations: No multi-class labeled evaluation set was used.
The test used the site's chat endpoint rather than a schema-enforced JSON response mode.
